{{Quote|I am Ovkhevam clan Bakh'tor. I serve the Noghri people here at the future of our world. You honor us with your presence.|Ovkhevam to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Ovkhevam clan Bakh'tor''' was the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] caretaker of the [[Kholm-grass|''kholm''-grass]] cleansed mountain region on [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]] during the [[Thrawn campaign]]. He walked the lands to make sure the plants were growing, and also kept an eye on the fugitive [[Khabarakh]].

Ovkhevam and Khabarakh greeted [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] upon his first arrival on Honoghr and hid him in their newly-cleansed growing lands.

==Personality and traits==
Ovkhevam was at an old age by appearance. He had a normal size for a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] but had long white hair and carried a staff.

==Appearances==
